theme: estate auction house schedules two hundred lots
title: Estate Auction House: Two Hundred Lots
strategies: trivial: sell lots in input order with reserve 0 everywhere (matches the checker baseline)
greedy: sort lots by their single highest bidder value, descending, reserve 0 (textbook 'sell the marquee stuff first, second price is already optimal' instinct)

structure-aware local search: build a bidder-overlap graph from each lot's top-2 bidders, round-robin/interleave the sale order across bidders' groups so no single rich bidder's budget gets burned in one consecutive block, seed reserves near each lot's second-highest value (with a monopoly bump on uncontested lots), then hill-climb order swaps and reserve deltas directly against the true replay objective under a wall-clock budget
invalid: outputs a non-permutation (repeats one lot id) to demonstrate the feasibility gate
